description.en: A fast, privacy-focused desktop app that reduces PNG, JPG, and WebP file sizes using MozJPEG, OptiPNG, and libwebp — with batch processing, smart quality detection, and format conversion. All processing stays on your device.
description.zh: 一款快速、注重隐私的桌面应用，使用 MozJPEG、OptiPNG 和 libwebp 压缩 PNG、JPG 和 WebP 图片——支持批量处理、智能质量检测和格式转换。所有处理均在本地完成。
